Bash("E:\\OneDrive\\君实\\demos\\customer-mp\\src\\pages\\scan\\index.vue" << 'EOF'
<script setup lang="ts">
definePage\({
  name: 'scan',
  type: 'home',
  style: {
    navigationBarTitleText: '扫码绑定',
    navigationBarBackgroundColor: '#007AFF',
    navigationBarTextStyle: 'white',
  },
}\)

const router = useRouter\(\)
const patientStore = usePatientStore\(\)
const toast = useGlobalToast\(\)

const scanned = ref\(false\)
const doctor = ref<any>\(null\)
const loading = ref\(false\)
const binding = ref\(false\)

async function simulateScan\(\) {
  loading.value = true
  try {
    const res: any = await patientApi.scan\(\).send\(\)
    doctor.value = res.doctor
    scanned.value = true
  }
  catch {
    toast.error\('扫码失败，请重试'\)
  }
  finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

async function confirmBinding\(\) {
  if \(!doctor.value\)
    return
  binding.value = true
  try {
    await patientApi.bindDoctor\({ doctorId: doctor.value.id }\).send\(\)
    patientStore.update\({ isBound: true, boundDoctor: doctor.value }\)
    router.replaceAll\({ name: 'home' }\)
  }
  catch {
    toast.error\('绑定失败，请重试'\)
  }
  finally {
    binding.value = false
  }
}

function rescan\(\) {
  scanned.value = false
  doctor.value = null
}
</script>

<template>
  <!-- 扫码步骤：蓝色背景 -->
  <view v-if="!scanned" class="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-[#007AFF]">
    <view class="flex flex-col items-center px-8 w-full">
      <view class="mb-8 text-center">
        <text class="block text-8 font-bold text-white mb-2">扫码绑定医生</text>
        <text class="text-4 text-white opacity-80">扫描医生提供的专属二维码</text>
      </view>

      <view class="relative mb-10" @click="simulateScan">
        <view class="w-60 h-60 rounded-full bg-white/10 flex items-center justify-center">
          <view class="w-48 h-48 rounded-full bg-white/15 flex items-center justify-center">
            <view class="w-36 h-36 rounded-full bg-white/20 flex items-center justify-center">
              <view class="w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-white flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg">
                <wd-loading v-if="loading" color="#007AFF" size="40px" />
                <wd-icon v-else name="scan" size="48px" color="#007AFF" />
              </view>
            </view>
          </view>
        </view>
      </view>

      <text class="text-4 text-white opacity-70 mb-2">点击模拟扫码</text>
      <text class="text-3 text-white opacity-50">实际使用时将调用相机扫描二维码</text>
    </view>
  </view>

  <!-- 确认绑定步骤：白色背景，对照原型 -->
  <view v-else class="min-h-screen bg-[#f0f4ff] flex flex-col px-5 pt-10">
    <!-- 识别成功标签 -->
    <view class="flex justify-center mb-6">
      <view class="bg-green-50 border border-green-200 rounded-full px-5 py-1.5 flex items-center gap-1.5">
        <wd-icon name="check-circle" size="16px" color="#34C759" />
        <text class="text-3.5 text-green-600 font-medium">识别成功</text>
      </view>
    </view>

    <!-- 标题 -->
    <view class="text-center mb-6">
      <text class="block text-7 font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">确认绑定服务</text>
    </view>

    <!-- 医生信息卡片 -->
    <view class="bg-white rounded-4 p-5 mb-4 shadow-sm">
      <view class="flex items-center gap-4">
        <image
          :src="doctor?.avatar"
          class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full"
          mode="aspectFill"
        />
        <view class="flex-1">
          <text class="block text-5 font-bold text-gray-900">{{ doctor?.name }} {{ doctor?.dept && '主任医师' }}</text>
          <text class="block text-3.5 text-gray-500 mt-1">{{ doctor?.hospital }}</text>
        </view>
      </view>
    </view>

    <!-- 说明文字卡片 -->
    <view class="bg-white rounded-4 p-5 mb-8 shadow-sm">
      <text class="text-3.5 text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">绑定后，您可以享受到由该医生团队提供的全程治疗随访、用药指导及健康咨询服务。</text>
    </view>

    <!-- 按钮区域 -->
    <view class="px-1">
      <wd-button
        type="primary"
        block
        size="large"
        :loading="binding"
        custom-class="mb-4"
        @click="confirmBinding"
      >
        确认绑定
      </wd-button>
      <view class="flex justify-center">
        <text class="text-4 text-[#007AFF]" @click="rescan">重新扫码</text>
      </view>
    </view>
  </view>
</template>
EOF)

Bash("E:\\OneDrive\\君实\\demos\\customer-mp\\src\\pages\\education\\detail.vue" << 'VEOF'
<script setup lang="ts">
definePage\({
  name: 'education-detail',
  style: { navigationBarTitleText: '文章详情' },
}\)

const patientStore = usePatientStore\(\)
const toast = useGlobalToast\(\)

const article = ref<any>\(null\)
const loading = ref\(true\)
const articleId = ref\(0\)

onLoad\(\(options\) => {
  const id = Number\(options?.id\)
  articleId.value = id
  patientApi.getEducationDetail\(id\).send\(\).then\(\(res: any\) => {
    article.value = res
  }\).catch\(\(\) => {
    toast.error\('加载失败'\)
  }\).finally\(\(\) => {
    loading.value = false
  }\)
}\)

const isFav = computed\(\(\) => patientStore.isFavorite\(articleId.value\)\)

function toggleFav\(\) {
  patientStore.toggleFavorite\(articleId.value\)
  toast.success\(isFav.value ? '已取消收藏' : '已收藏'\)
}
</script>

<template>
  <view class="min-h-screen bg-white">
    <view v-if="loading" class="flex justify-center py-16">
      <wd-loading color="#007AFF" />
    </view>
    <view v-else-if="article">
      <!-- 头部 -->
      <view class="px-5 pt-6 pb-4 border-b border-gray-100">
        <view class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
          <view class="px-2 py-0.5 bg-blue-50 rounded-full">
            <text class="text-2.5 text-blue-500">{{ article.category }}</text>
          </view>
          <view class="px-2 py-0.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full">
            <text class="text-2.5 text-gray-500">{{ article.type }}</text>
          </view>
        </view>
        <text class="block text-5 font-bold text-gray-800 mb-3 leading-relaxed">{{ article.title }}</text>
        <view class="flex items-center justify-between">
          <text class="text-3 text-gray-400">{{ article.date }} · {{ article.readCount }} 阅读</text>
          <view class="flex items-center gap-1" @click="toggleFav">
            <wd-icon :name="isFav ? 'star-filled' : 'star'" size="20px" :color="isFav ? '#FF9500' : '#999'" />
            <text class="text-3" :class="isFav ? 'text-orange-400' : 'text-gray-400'">{{ isFav ? '已收藏' : '收藏' }}</text>
          </view>
        </view>
      </view>

      <!-- 内容 -->
      <view class="px-5 py-5">
        <text class="text-4 text-gray-700 leading-loose">{{ article.content }}</text>
      </view>
    </view>
    <view v-else class="flex justify-center py-16">
      <wd-empty description="文章不存在" />
    </view>
  </view>
</template>
VEOF)

Bash("E:\\OneDrive\\君实\\demos\\customer-mp\\src\\pages\\upload-docs\\index.vue" << 'VEOF'
<script setup lang="ts">
import { patientApi } from '@/api/patient'

definePage\({
  name: 'upload-docs',
  style: { navigationBarTitleText: '智能建档' },
}\)

const router = useRouter\(\)
const patientStore = usePatientStore\(\)
const toast = useGlobalToast\(\)

// 四张卡片
const docs = ref\([
  { key: 'idcard',      label: '身份证正面', icon: '🪪', iconBg: '#E6F0FF', required: true,  uploaded: false, filePath: '' },
  { key: 'diagnosis',   label: '诊断证明',   icon: '📋', iconBg: '#FFF2E6', required: true,  uploaded: false, filePath: '' },
  { key: 'prescription',label: '处方单',     icon: '💊', iconBg: '#E8F8E8', required: false, uploaded: false, filePath: '' },
  { key: 'consent',     label: '知情同意书', icon: '🖋️', iconBg: '#F3E8FF', required: true,  uploaded: false, filePath: '' },
]\)

// 知情同意书多页
const consentPages = ref<string[]>\([]\)

// OCR 状态
const ocrLoading = ref\(false\)
const ocrVisible = ref\(false\)
const form = ref\({ name: '', idCard: '', gender: '', birthDate: '', disease: '', stage: '', hospital: '', medication: '', phone: '' }\)

// 手机号授权
const phoneAuthorized = ref\(false\)
const showWxAuth = ref\(false\)
const mockPhone = '13812346789'

// 图片预览
const viewerVisible = ref\(false\)
const viewerImages = ref<string[]>\([]\)
const viewerIndex = ref\(0\)

// 初始化：同步已有数据
onMounted\(\(\) => {
  const info = patientStore.info
  if \(info.phone\) {
    form.value.phone = info.phone
    phoneAuthorized.value = true
  }
  if \(info.consentPhotos?.length\) {
    consentPages.value = [...info.consentPhotos]
    const c = docs.value.find\(d => d.key === 'consent'\)!
    c.uploaded = true
  }
}\)

function chooseDoc\(doc: typeof docs.value[0]\) {
  if \(doc.key === 'consent'\) {
    addConsentPage\(\)
    return
  }
  uni.chooseImage\({
    count: 1, sizeType: ['compressed'], sourceType: ['album', 'camera'],
    success: \(res\) => {
      doc.filePath = res.tempFilePaths[0]
      doc.uploaded = true
      runOcr\(doc.key, doc.filePath\)
    },
  }\)
}

function addConsentPage\(\) {
  uni.chooseImage\({
    count: 1, sizeType: ['compressed'], sourceType: ['album', 'camera'],
    success: \(res\) => {
      consentPages.value.push\(res.tempFilePaths[0]\)
      const c = docs.value.find\(d => d.key === 'consent'\)!
      c.uploaded = true
    },
  }\)
}

function removeConsentPage\(i: number\) {
  consentPages.value.splice\(i, 1\)
  if \(consentPages.value.length === 0\) {
    const c = docs.value.find\(d => d.key === 'consent'\)!
    c.uploaded = false
  }
}

async function runOcr\(type: string, filePath: string\) {
  ocrLoading.value = true
  ocrVisible.value = true
  try {
    const res: any = await patientApi.ocr\(type, filePath\).send\(\)
    const r = res.result || {}
    if \(type === 'idcard'\) {
      if \(r.name\)      form.value.name = r.name
      if \(r.idCard\)    form.value.idCard = r.idCard
      if \(r.gender\)    form.value.gender = r.gender
      if \(r.birthDate\) form.value.birthDate = r.birthDate
    } else if \(type === 'diagnosis'\) {
      if \(r.disease\)  form.value.disease = r.disease
      if \(r.stage\)    form.value.stage = r.stage
      if \(r.hospital\) form.value.hospital = r.hospital
    } else if \(type === 'prescription'\) {
      if \(r.medication\) form.value.medication = r.medication
    }
  } finally {
    ocrLoading.value = false
  }
}

function confirmWxAuth\(\) {
  form.value.phone = mockPhone
  phoneAuthorized.value = true
  showWxAuth.value = false
}

function openViewer\(images: string[], index = 0\) {
  viewerImages.value = images
  viewerIndex.value = index
  viewerVisible.value = true
}

const hasRequired = computed\(\(\) => docs.value.filter\(d => d.required\).every\(d => d.uploaded\)\)

const submitting = ref\(false\)
async function handleSubmit\(\) {
  if \(!form.value.name || !form.value.idCard || !form.value.disease\) {
    toast.error\('请确保姓名、身份证号和确诊疾病已填写'\); return
  }
  if \(!form.value.phone\) {
    toast.error\('请先授权获取手机号'\); showWxAuth.value = true; return
  }
  if \(consentPages.value.length === 0\) {
    toast.error\('请上传知情同意书（至少 1 页）'\); return
  }
  submitting.value = true
  try {
    await patientApi.uploadDocs\({ ...form.value, consentPhotos: consentPages.value }\).send\(\)
    patientStore.update\({
      ...form.value,
      ocrIdCard: docs.value[0].uploaded,
      ocrDiagnosis: docs.value[1].uploaded,
      ocrPrescription: docs.value[2].uploaded,
      ocrConsent: consentPages.value.length > 0,
      consentPhotos: consentPages.value,
      consentStatus: 'active',
      isRegistered: true,
      hasProfile: true,
    }\)
    toast.success\('建档成功！资料已提交审核'\)
    setTimeout\(\(\) => router.replaceAll\({ name: 'home' }\), 1200\)
  } finally {
    submitting.value = false
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <view class="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 pb-28">
    <!-- AI 提示条 -->
    <view class="mx-4 mt-4 mb-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-3 px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3">
      <text class="text-6">🤖</text>
      <view>
        <text class="block text-3.5 font-bold text-blue-600">AI 辅助识别</text>
        <text class="text-3 text-blue-400">拍照上传资料，系统自动识别并填充信息</text>
      </view>
    </view>

    <!-- 上传卡片区 -->
    <view class="mx-4 mb-4">
      <text class="block text-3 text-gray-400 font-medium mb-3 tracking-widest">上传材料</text>
      <view class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
        <view
          v-for="doc in docs" :key="doc.key"
          class="bg-white rounded-4 p-4 border-2 transition-all relative overflow-hidden"
          :class="doc.uploaded ? 'border-green-400 bg-green-50' : 'border-dashed border-blue-100'"
          @click="chooseDoc\(doc\)"
        >
          <!-- 已上传勾 -->
          <view v-if="doc.uploaded" class="absolute top-2.5 right-2.5 w-5.5 h-5.5 rounded-full bg-green-500 flex items-center justify-center">
            <text class="text-white text-2.5 font-bold">✓</text>
          </view>
          <view class="w-13 h-13 rounded-3 flex items-center justify-center text-6 mb-3" :style="{ background: doc.iconBg }">
            {{ doc.icon }}
          </view>
          <text class="block text-3.5 font-bold text-gray-800 mb-1">{{ doc.label }}</text>
          <text class="text-3" :class="doc.uploaded ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-gray-400'">
            {{ doc.uploaded ? \(doc.key === 'consent' ? `已上传 ${consentPages.length} 页` : '已上传 ✓'\) : \(doc.required ? '必传 · 拍照上传' : '选传 · 拍照上传'\) }}
          </text>
          <!-- 缩略图 -->
          <image v-if="doc.uploaded && doc.filePath && doc.key !== 'consent'" :src="doc.filePath" class="w-full h-15 rounded-2 mt-2 object-cover" mode="aspectFill" @click.stop="openViewer\([doc.filePath], 0\)" />
        </view>
      </view>
    </view>

    <!-- 知情同意书多页区 -->
    <view v-if="consentPages.length > 0" class="mx-4 mb-4 bg-white rounded-3 p-4">
      <view class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
        <text class="text-3.5 font-bold text-gray-800">🖋️ 知情同意书</text>
        <text class="text-3 text-gray-400">已上传 {{ consentPages.length }} 页</text>
      </view>
      <scroll-view scroll-x class="flex gap-2.5" style="white-space: nowrap;">
        <view class="inline-flex gap-2.5">
          <view v-for="\(src, i\) in consentPages" :key="i" class="relative flex-shrink-0 w-20 h-26 rounded-3 overflow-hidden border border-gray-200" @click="openViewer\(consentPages, i\)">
            <image :src="src" class="w-full h-full" mode="aspectFill" />
            <view class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-black/50 py-0.5 text-center">
              <text class="text-white text-2.5 font-bold">第 {{ i + 1 }} 页</text>
            </view>
            <view class="absolute top-1 right-1 w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center" @click.stop="removeConsentPage\(i\)">
              <text class="text-white text-2.5">✕</text>
            </view>
          </view>
          <!-- 添加按钮 -->
          <view class="flex-shrink-0 w-20 h-26 rounded-3 border-2 border-dashed border-blue-200 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1" @click="addConsentPage">
            <text class="text-6 text-blue-400">+</text>
            <text class="text-2.5 text-gray-400">添加</text>
          </view>
        </view>
      </scroll-view>
    </view>

    <!-- OCR 识别中 -->
    <view v-if="ocrLoading" class="mx-4 mb-4 bg-white rounded-3 p-8 flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
      <wd-loading color="#007AFF" size="48px" />
      <text class="text-4 font-bold text-gray-800">AI 正在识别中...</text>
      <text class="text-3 text-gray-400">请稍候，正在提取文字信息</text>
    </view>

    <!-- 识别结果表单 -->
    <view v-if="ocrVisible && !ocrLoading" class="mx-4 mb-4">
      <view class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
        <text class="text-3 text-gray-400 font-medium tracking-widest">识别结果</text>
        <view class="bg-blue-50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">
          <text class="text-2.5 text-blue-500">AI 已识别 · 可修改</text>
        </view>
      </view>

      <!-- 身份信息 -->
      <view class="bg-white rounded-3 px-4 mb-3">
        <view class="flex items-center py-3.5 border-b border-gray-50">
          <text class="w-22 text-3.5 text-gray-500 flex-shrink-0"><text class="text-red-500">*</text>姓名</text>
          <wd-input v-model="form.name" placeholder="待识别" :border="false" custom-class="flex-1 text-right" />
        </view>
        <view class="flex items-center py-3.5 border-b border-gray-50">
          <text class="w-22 text-3.5 text-gray-500 flex-shrink-0"><text class="text-red-500">*</text>身份证号</text>
          <wd-input v-model="form.idCard" placeholder="待识别" :border="false" custom-class="flex-1 text-right" />
        </view>
        <view class="flex items-center py-3.5 border-b border-gray-50">
          <text class="w-22 text-3.5 text-gray-500 flex-shrink-0">性别</text>
          <wd-input v-model="form.gender" placeholder="待识别" :border="false" custom-class="flex-1 text-right" />
        </view>
        <view class="flex items-center py-3.5">
          <text class="w-22 text-3.5 text-gray-500 flex-shrink-0">出生日期</text>
          <wd-input v-model="form.birthDate" placeholder="待识别" :border="false" custom-class="flex-1 text-right" />
        </view>
      </view>

      <!-- 诊断信息 -->
      <view class="bg-white rounded-3 px-4 mb-3">
        <view class="flex items-center py-3.5 border-b border-gray-50">
          <text class="w-22 text-3.5 text-gray-500 flex-shrink-0"><text class="text-red-500">*</text>确诊疾病</text>
          <wd-input v-model="form.disease" placeholder="待识别" :border="false" custom-class="flex-1 text-right" />
        </view>
        <view class="flex items-center py-3.5 border-b border-gray-50">
          <text class="w-22 text-3.5 text-gray-500 flex-shrink-0">疾病分期</text>
          <wd-input v-model="form.stage" placeholder="待识别" :border="false" custom-class="flex-1 text-right" />
        </view>
        <view class="flex items-center py-3.5">
          <text class="w-22 text-3.5 text-gray-500 flex-shrink-0">确诊医院</text>
          <wd-input v-model="form.hospital" placeholder="待识别" :border="false" custom-class="flex-1 text-right" />
        </view>
      </view>

      <!-- 用药 + 手机号 -->
      <view class="bg-white rounded-3 px-4 mb-3">
        <view class="flex items-center py-3.5 border-b border-gray-50">
          <text class="w-22 text-3.5 text-gray-500 flex-shrink-0">用药方案</text>
          <wd-input v-model="form.medication" placeholder="选传后识别" :border="false" custom-class="flex-1 text-right" />
        </view>
        <view class="flex items-center py-3.5 border-b border-gray-50">
          <text class="w-22 text-3.5 text-gray-500 flex-shrink-0"><text class="text-red-500">*</text>手机号</text>
          <wd-input v-model="form.phone" placeholder="点击下方授权" :border="false" :disabled="true" custom-class="flex-1 text-right" />
        </view>
        <view class="py-3">
          <view
            class="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2.5 rounded-3 border-2 transition-all"
            :class="phoneAuthorized ? 'border-green-400 bg-green-50' : 'border-dashed border-green-300 bg-green-50/50'"
            @click="!phoneAuthorized && \(showWxAuth = true\)"
          >
            <text class="text-4">{{ phoneAuthorized ? '✅' : '📱' }}</text>
            <text class="text-3.5 font-bold" :class="phoneAuthorized ? 'text-gray-800' : 'text-green-600'">
              {{ phoneAuthorized ? '已授权：' + form.phone.replace\(/\(\\d{3}\)\\d{4}\(\\d{4}\)/, '$1****$2'\) : '微信一键授权获取手机号' }}
            </text>
          </view>
        </view>
      </view>

      <text class="block text-center text-3 text-gray-400 mb-4">信息仅用于临床管理，已加密存储</text>
    </view>

    <!-- 底部提交按钮 -->
    <view class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white px-4 py-3 border-t border-gray-100">
      <wd-button type="primary" block size="large" :loading="submitting" :disabled="!hasRequired" @click="handleSubmit">
        {{ hasRequired ? '确认提交' : '请上传必填资料' }}
      </wd-button>
    </view>

    <!-- 微信授权弹窗 -->
    <view v-if="showWxAuth" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-end justify-center" style="z-index: 1000;" @click="showWxAuth = false">
      <view class="w-full bg-white rounded-t-6 px-6 pt-8 pb-10" @click.stop>
        <view class="w-14 h-14 rounded-3 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-400 to-green-600 flex items-center justify-center text-6 mx-auto mb-4">📱</view>
        <text class="block text-center text-5 font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">获取你的手机号</text>
        <text class="block text-center text-3.5 text-gray-500 mb-1">君实生物患者管理申请获取你的手机号</text>

Bash("E:\\OneDrive\\君实\\demos\\customer-mp\\src\\pages\\upload-docs\\index.vue" << 'ENDOFFILE'
<script setup lang="ts">
import { patientApi } from '@/api/patient'

definePage\({
  name: 'upload-docs',
  style: { navigationBarTitleText: '智能建档' },
}\)

const router = useRouter\(\)
const patientStore = usePatientStore\(\)
const toast = useGlobalToast\(\)

const docs = ref\([
  { key: 'idcard',       label: '身份证正面', icon: '🪪', iconBg: '#E6F0FF', required: true,  uploaded: false, filePath: '' },
  { key: 'diagnosis',    label: '诊断证明',   icon: '📋', iconBg: '#FFF2E6', required: true,  uploaded: false, filePath: '' },
  { key: 'prescription', label: '处方单',     icon: '💊', iconBg: '#E8F8E8', required: false, uploaded: false, filePath: '' },
  { key: 'consent',      label: '知情同意书', icon: '🖋️', iconBg: '#F3E8FF', required: true,  uploaded: false, filePath: '' },
]\)

const consentPages = ref<string[]>\([]\)
const ocrLoading = ref\(false\)
const ocrVisible = ref\(false\)
const form = ref\({ name: '', idCard: '', gender: '', birthDate: '', disease: '', stage: '', hospital: '', medication: '', phone: '' }\)
const phoneAuthorized = ref\(false\)
const showWxAuth = ref\(false\)
const mockPhone = '13812346789'
const viewerVisible = ref\(false\)
const viewerImages = ref<string[]>\([]\)
const viewerIndex = ref\(0\)
const submitting = ref\(false\)

onMounted\(\(\) => {
  const info = patientStore.info
  if \(info.phone\) { form.value.phone = info.phone; phoneAuthorized.value = true }
  if \(info.consentPhotos?.length\) {
    consentPages.value = [...info.consentPhotos]
    docs.value.find\(d => d.key === 'consent'\)!.uploaded = true
  }
}\)

function chooseDoc\(doc: typeof docs.value[0]\) {
  if \(doc.key === 'consent'\) { addConsentPage\(\); return }
  uni.chooseImage\({
    count: 1, sizeType: ['compressed'], sourceType: ['album', 'camera'],
    success: \(res\) => {
      doc.filePath = res.tempFilePaths[0]
      doc.uploaded = true
      runOcr\(doc.key, doc.filePath\)
    },
  }\)
}

function addConsentPage\(\) {
  uni.chooseImage\({
    count: 1, sizeType: ['compressed'], sourceType: ['album', 'camera'],
    success: \(res\) => {
      consentPages.value.push\(res.tempFilePaths[0]\)
      docs.value.find\(d => d.key === 'consent'\)!.uploaded = true
    },
  }\)
}

function removeConsentPage\(i: number\) {
  consentPages.value.splice\(i, 1\)
  if \(consentPages.value.length === 0\) docs.value.find\(d => d.key === 'consent'\)!.uploaded = false
}

async function runOcr\(type: string, filePath: string\) {
  ocrLoading.value = true
  ocrVisible.value = true
  try {
    const res: any = await patientApi.ocr\(type, filePath\).send\(\)
    const r = res.result || {}
    if \(type === 'idcard'\) {
      if \(r.name\) form.value.name = r.name
      if \(r.idCard\) form.value.idCard = r.idCard
      if \(r.gender\) form.value.gender = r.gender
      if \(r.birthDate\) form.value.birthDate = r.birthDate
    } else if \(type === 'diagnosis'\) {
      if \(r.disease\) form.value.disease = r.disease
      if \(r.stage\) form.value.stage = r.stage
      if \(r.hospital\) form.value.hospital = r.hospital
    } else if \(type === 'prescription'\) {
      if \(r.medication\) form.value.medication = r.medication
    }
  } finally { ocrLoading.value = false }
}

function confirmWxAuth\(\) {
  form.value.phone = mockPhone
  phoneAuthorized.value = true
  showWxAuth.value = false
}

function openViewer\(images: string[], index = 0\) {
  viewerImages.value = images
  viewerIndex.value = index
  viewerVisible.value = true
}

const hasRequired = computed\(\(\) => docs.value.filter\(d => d.required\).every\(d => d.uploaded\)\)

async function handleSubmit\(\) {
  if \(!form.value.name || !form.value.idCard || !form.value.disease\) {
    toast.error\('请确保姓名、身份证号和确诊疾病已填写'\); return
  }
  if \(!form.value.phone\) { toast.error\('请先授权获取手机号'\); showWxAuth.value = true; return }
  if \(consentPages.value.length === 0\) { toast.error\('请上传知情同意书（至少 1 页）'\); return }
  submitting.value = true
  try {
    await patientApi.uploadDocs\({ ...form.value, consentPhotos: consentPages.value }\).send\(\)
    patientStore.update\({
      ...form.value,
      ocrIdCard: docs.value[0].uploaded,
      ocrDiagnosis: docs.value[1].uploaded,
      ocrPrescription: docs.value[2].uploaded,
      ocrConsent: consentPages.value.length > 0,
      consentPhotos: consentPages.value,
      consentStatus: 'active',
      isRegistered: true,
      hasProfile: true,
    }\)
    toast.success\('建档成功！资料已提交审核'\)
    setTimeout\(\(\) => router.replaceAll\({ name: 'home' }\), 1200\)
  } finally { submitting.value = false }
}
</script>

<template>
  <view class="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 pb-28">
    <view class="mx-4 mt-4 mb-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-3 px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3">
      <text class="text-6">🤖</text>
      <view>
        <text class="block text-3.5 font-bold text-blue-600">AI 辅助识别</text>
        <text class="text-3 text-blue-400">拍照上传资料，系统自动识别并填充信息</text>
      </view>
    </view>

    <view class="mx-4 mb-4">
      <text class="block text-3 text-gray-400 font-medium mb-3 tracking-widest">上传材料</text>
      <view class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
        <view
          v-for="doc in docs" :key="doc.key"
          class="bg-white rounded-4 p-4 border-2 transition-all relative overflow-hidden"
          :class="doc.uploaded ? 'border-green-400 bg-green-50' : 'border-dashed border-blue-100'"
          @click="chooseDoc\(doc\)"
        >
          <view v-if="doc.uploaded" class="absolute top-2.5 right-2.5 w-5.5 h-5.5 rounded-full bg-green-500 flex items-center justify-center">
            <text class="text-white text-2.5 font-bold">✓</text>
          </view>
          <view class="w-13 h-13 rounded-3 flex items-center justify-center text-6 mb-3" :style="{ background: doc.iconBg }">
            {{ doc.icon }}
          </view>
          <text class="block text-3.5 font-bold text-gray-800 mb-1">{{ doc.label }}</text>
          <text class="text-3" :class="doc.uploaded ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-gray-400'">
            {{ doc.uploaded ? \(doc.key === 'consent' ? `已上传 ${consentPages.length} 页` : '已上传 ✓'\) : \(doc.required ? '必传 · 拍照上传' : '选传 · 拍照上传'\) }}
          </text>
          <image v-if="doc.uploaded && doc.filePath && doc.key !== 'consent'" :src="doc.filePath" class="w-full h-15 rounded-2 mt-2" mode="aspectFill" @click.stop="openViewer\([doc.filePath], 0\)" />
        </view>
      </view>
    </view>

    <view v-if="consentPages.length > 0" class="mx-4 mb-4 bg-white rounded-3 p-4">
      <view class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
        <text class="text-3.5 font-bold text-gray-800">🖋️ 知情同意书</text>
        <text class="text-3 text-gray-400">已上传 {{ consentPages.length }} 页</text>
      </view>
      <scroll-view scroll-x style="white-space: nowrap;">
        <view class="inline-flex gap-2.5">
          <view v-for="\(src, i\) in consentPages" :key="i" class="relative flex-shrink-0 rounded-3 overflow-hidden border border-gray-200" style="width:80px;height:106px;" @click="openViewer\(consentPages, i\)">
            <image :src="src" class="w-full h-full" mode="aspectFill" />
            <view class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-black/50 py-0.5 text-center">
              <text class="text-white text-2.5 font-bold">第 {{ i + 1 }} 页</text>
            </view>
            <view class="absolute top-1 right-1 w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center" @click.stop="removeConsentPage\(i\)">
              <text class="text-white text-2.5">✕</text>
            </view>
          </view>
          <view class="flex-shrink-0 rounded-3 border-2 border-dashed border-blue-200 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1" style="width:80px;height:106px;" @click="addConsentPage">
            <text class="text-6 text-blue-400">+</text>
            <text class="text-2.5 text-gray-400">添加</text>
          </view>
        </view>
      </scroll-view>
    </view>

    <view v-if="ocrLoading" class="mx-4 mb-4 bg-white rounded-3 p-8 flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
      <wd-loading color="#007AFF" size="48px" />
      <text class="text-4 font-bold text-gray-800">AI 正在识别中...</text>
      <text class="text-3 text-gray-400">请稍候，正在提取文字信息</text>
    </view>

    <view v-if="ocrVisible && !ocrLoading" class="mx-4 mb-4">
      <view class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
        <text class="text-3 text-gray-400 font-medium tracking-widest">识别结果</text>
        <view class="bg-blue-50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">
          <text class="text-2.5 text-blue-500">AI 已识别 · 可修改</text>
        </view>

      <view class="bg-white rounded-3 px-4 mb-3">

          <wd-input v-model="form.idCard" placeholder="待识别" :border="false" custom-class="flex-1 text-right" />

          >

            </text>

    <view class="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white px-4 py-3 border-t border-gray-100">

        {{ hasRequired ? '确认提交' : '请上传必填资料' }}
      </wd-button>

    <view v-if="showWxAuth" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-end justify-center" style="z-index:1000;" @click="showWxAuth = false">

        <wd-button block size="large" custom-class="mb-3 bg-green-500! border-green-500! text-white!" @click="confirmWxAuth">允许</wd-button>
